hero.title: StoryCrafter
hero.description: Plan story arcs and scenes in a clear, connected structure.

differences.title: Keep the story arc and scenes connected
differences.description: StoryCrafter focuses on planning narrative structure before or during writing.

items.title: Story arcs
items.description: Shape the overall direction of the story.

items.title: Scene planning
items.description: Organize scenes around the narrative arc.

items.title: Plan review
items.description: Review how the planned scenes connect.

feel.title: A clearer path through the story
feel.description: The workflow keeps the overall arc and individual scenes visible.

items.title: Shape the arc
items.description: Define the broad movement of the story.

items.title: Plan the scenes
items.description: Arrange the moments that support the arc.

items.title: Review the structure
items.description: Check how the planned scenes connect.

audiences.title: Who uses StoryCrafter
audiences.description: Useful for writers planning stories through arcs and scenes.

items.title: New writers
items.description: Build a clear structure before drafting.

resourceSection.title: Story-planning essentials

technicalSection.title: Designed for story-arc and scene planning
